text:
This is a Rust workspace (rooted at `rust/Cargo.toml`) with 9 crates:

| Crate | Purpose |
|---|---|
| **rusty-claude-cli** | The main CLI binary (`claw`) — terminal UI, markdown rendering, readline input, OAuth auth. |
| **runtime** | Core execution engine — session persistence, permissions, MCP clients, prompt assembly, bash execution, and the conversation loop. |
| **api** | HTTP client for the Anthropic API — message streaming, OAuth tokens, prompt caching. |
| **tools** | Tool execution infrastructure — invokes AI models, manages tool registries (LSP, MCP), permission enforcement. |
| **commands** | Slash command definitions and handlers — plugins, agents, MCP servers, skills. |
| **plugins** | Plugin lifecycle management — installation, configuration, hooks for builtin/bundled/external plugins. |
| **compat-harness** | Compatibility bridge between the upstream TypeScript codebase and this Rust implementation. |
| **telemetry** | Analytics events, session traces, and structured logging. |
| **mock-anthropic-service** | Test server that mocks the Anthropic API for integration testing. |

The workspace forbids `unsafe` code and uses Rust 2021 edition across all crates.
